arts.ttl: Steven Gerrard's Saudi Arabia nightmare takes fresh twist as Liverpool legend handed new blow
arts.sum: Steven Gerrard's Al-Ettifaq side were beaten 3-1 by Al-Hilal on Friday night, with the Liverpool legend coming in for criticism from the Saudi club's supporters

arts.ttl: Liverpool v Aston Villa: FPL team news + predicted line-ups
arts.sum: Team form, absentees and our predicted XIs The post Liverpool v Aston Villa: FPL team news + predicted line-ups appeared first on Best FPL Tips, Advice, Team News, Picks, and Statistics from Fantasy Football Scout.

arts.ttl: Virgil van Dijk agrees with Arne Slot over 'important' Luis Diaz role in Liverpool team
arts.sum: Luis Diaz scored a hat-trick after starting as a central striker against Bayer Leverkusen and could begin in the role again vs Aston Villa

arts.ttl: Arne Slot sends plea to Liverpool fans for Aston Villa clash after what they did vs Bayer Leverkusen
arts.sum: Arne Slot has asked supporters to repeat what they did in the games vs Brighton and Bayer Leverkusen for tonight's fixture against Aston Villa.

arts.ttl: Thrashing Blues, Ian Taylor's debut and a trademark Andy Gray header - first trips to Aston Villa - Birmingham Live
arts.sum: Dave Browne: My grandad took me to my first match Can’t remember the year but it was against inter Milan in a cup match we lost 1-0 away and won 1-0 at Home Ray Houghton scored the goal it then went to penalties and Phil King scored the Winning penalty to send us through made even more special as Kevin Keegan sat directly behind me Callum Bromley: My first game was 08/09 We lost 2-1 to Middlesbrough my dads boss gave us tickets, when I walked into villa park my hairs stood up and I knew it was home had a season ticket up until 13-14 when I started coaching, all my family are WBA supporters.

arts.ttl: ‘Tough’: Alan Shearer has now predicted the result of Liverpool vs Aston Villa
arts.sum: Liverpool face Aston Villa this weekend in what is a very big game for both teams. Liverpool will want to win to further strengthen their...

arts.ttl: Arne Slot reveals important factor in Liverpool hiring him as manager
arts.sum: Arne Slot has won 14 of his first 16 games in charge of Liverpool, adopting a slightly more conservative style of play to former boss Jurgen Klopp.

arts.ttl: I didn’t want to become a loser at Liverpool – so I found a solution to make me happy
arts.sum: Christian Benteke was a big-money signing for Liverpool from Aston Villa in 2015 but his short spell at Anfield did not go to plan and he was sold to Crystal Palace

arts.ttl: Arne Slot makes 'far from ideal' admission ahead of Liverpool v Aston Villa
arts.sum: Slot, who has guided Liverpool to the top of the Premier League and Champions League in his first season in charge of the club, has tinkered little with the squad he inherited from Jurgen Klopp; indeed Italian international Chiesa was a rare new face in the summer, and with Jota out Slot reasons he may have had more game time had he been ready to play. As it is, the playmaker will miss another game when Villa and Unai Emery - who are in need of a pick me up after three straight defeats in three separate competitions - visit Merseyside, but Slot, who isn't concerned, expects him back during the forthcoming international break.

arts.ttl: Aston Villa transfer target finally set for chance after lengthy exclusion
arts.sum: Chelsea manager Enzo Maresca has teased that Aston Villa summer transfer target Joao Felix is likely to be handed an opportunity in the Blues' Premier League side in the near future after weeks of omission and frustration. "I feel a shame for Joao and I would like to give him more minutes in the Premier League, but we need defensive balance and we cannot play with Joao, Cole [Palmer], Christo," Maresca said.
